CommunityApplications.Profile: Installs and supervises nvidia_gpu_exporter, which exposes NVIDIA GPU metrics (utilization, temperature, power, clocks, memory) in Prometheus format on port 9835. Includes a settings page under Settings for port, auto-start, log level and nvidia-smi options, with service controls and live status. Requires the Nvidia Driver plugin for GPU data. The bundled exporter version is updated automatically from upstream releases. Report issues on GitHub at the link below.
